goals package#

Subpackages#

Submodules#

goals.admin module#

goals.apps module#

class goals.apps.GoalsConfig(app_name, app_module)[source]#

Bases: AppConfig

name = 'goals'#

goals.models module#

class goals.models.Goal(*args, **kwargs)[source]#

Bases: Model

Model representing a user’s savings goal.

id#

Unique identifier for the goal.

Type:

UUID

author#

The user who owns the goal.

Type:

User

name#

Title of the savings goal.

Type:

str

description#

Detailed description of the goal.

Type:

text

dueDate#

Target date to achieve the goal.

Type:

date

target#

Total amount of money to be saved.

Type:

decimal

current#

Amount currently saved.

Type:

decimal

image#

Optional image representing the goal.

Type:

image

exception DoesNotExist#

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned#

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

exception NotUpdated#

Bases: ObjectNotUpdated, DatabaseError

author#

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Child.parent is a ForwardManyToOneDescriptor instance.

author_id#
createdAt#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

current#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

description#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

dueDate#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

property getProgress#

Calculates the savings progress as a percentage.

Returns:

Percentage of completion (0 to 100).

Return type:

float

get_next_by_createdAt(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: createdAt>, is_next=True, **kwargs)#
get_next_by_updatedAt(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: updatedAt>, is_next=True, **kwargs)#
get_previous_by_createdAt(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: createdAt>, is_next=False, **kwargs)#
get_previous_by_updatedAt(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: updatedAt>, is_next=False, **kwargs)#
id#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

image#

Just like the FileDescriptor, but for ImageFields. The only difference is assigning the width/height to the width_field/height_field, if appropriate.

name#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

objects = <django.db.models.manager.Manager object>#
target#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

updatedAt#

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

goals.tests module#

goals.urls module#

URL Routing for the Goals application.

This module defines the URL patterns for the Goals application, mapping each URL to its corresponding view function or class-based view.

goals.views module#

class goals.views.GoalCreateView(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: LoginRequiredMixin, CreateView

Creates a new savings goal for the logged-in user.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The HTTP request with goal details.

Returns:

The rendered template with the list of goals.

Return type:

HttpResponse

fields = ['name', 'description', 'dueDate', 'target', 'current', 'image']#
form_valid(form)[source]#

Sets the author of the goal to the current user before saving.

model#

alias of Goal

success_url = '/goals'#
template_name = 'goals/createGoal.html'#
class goals.views.GoalUpdateView(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: LoginRequiredMixin, UpdateView

Updates an existing savings goal for the logged-in user.

fields = ['name', 'description', 'dueDate', 'target', 'current', 'image']#
form_valid(form)[source]#

If the form is valid, save the associated model.

model#

alias of Goal

slug_field = 'id'#
slug_url_kwarg = 'goalId'#
success_url = '/goals'#
template_name = 'goals/updateGoal.html'#
goals.views.depositGoalAmount(request)[source]#

View function to update the current saved amount of a specific goal.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – Request object with ‘goal_id’ and ‘amount’.

Returns:

JSON response with success status and new current amount, or error message.

Return type:

HttpResponse or JsonResponse

goals.views.getGoal(request, goalId)[source]#

View function to retrieve and display details of a specific savings goal.

goals.views.getGoals(request)[source]#

View function to display all savings goals for the logged-in user.
